mnemonics: ODBC Rings Loudly (for the main packages: ODBC, RMySQL, RSQLite)
SELECT PIE (to remember the main SQL verbs: SELECT, PROJECT, JOIN)
keyPoints: Use the 'DBI' package as a common interface for different database systems.
Specific packages like 'RMySQL' or 'RSQLite' provide the backend drivers for each database type.
Always close your database connections using 'dbDisconnect()' to avoid resource leaks.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to install and load both the backend package (e.g., RPostgres) and the DBI interface.
Not sanitizing user inputs, leading to SQL injection vulnerabilities when building queries.
Leaving too many open connections by not properly closing them with dbDisconnect().
